user_query: Could you please provide me with the available websites to extract Amazon product data in the United States? Additionally, I would like to search for AMD Ryzen products on Amazon and retrieve the first page of results, including the product names, images, ratings, and prices. Finally, I'm curious about the categories of the searched products.

TaskList.description: Research and compile a list of websites that provide APIs or services to extract product data from Amazon in the United States.
Use an API to search for AMD Ryzen products on Amazon and retrieve the first page of results.
Extract the product names, images, ratings, and prices from the retrieved results.
Identify and list the categories of the searched AMD Ryzen products based on the retrieved results.
